headline: EVERY COMPLAINT IS A SIGNAL
subheading: Turn a fragmented complaints log into an inspection-ready, patient-focused part of your quality system.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical complaint handling and quality vigilance under GMP: a luminous teal-cyan signal pulse rising from a single returned amber glass vial, tracing through an elegant five-stage flow of interconnected glowing nodes that suggest receipt, triage, investigation, root-cause and CAPA closure. Faint concentric ripples radiate outward like an early-warning system, while a softly blurred wall of neatly ordered batch-record archives and stainless-steel laboratory forms recedes into deep navy shadow. A delicate magnifying-lens motif and clean trend-line graph float as translucent overlays, conveying scrutiny, traceability and pattern detection. Cool teal and cyan tones melt into deep navy, lifted by a single subtle fresh-green accent glinting along the signal path. Premium clinical-luxury mood, calm, precise and authoritative, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh and soft directional lighting. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
